abstractSnippet: Working on the central nervous system and using the Golgi method for staining it, as early as 1896 I had the opportunity to obtain microscopic preparations on which it was easy to verify that the fibers of the motor pyramidal bundles, passing through the pons Varolii, on their way separate collateral fibers from themselves to the nuclei of the pons Varolii.
